query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_recipes FROM recipes; SELECT COUNT(*) as recipes_with_image FROM recipes WHERE image IS NOT NULL AND image != ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as recipes_without_image FROM recipes WHERE image IS NULL OR image = ''; SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as coverage_percentage FROM recipes;
